description: Capability-keyed model registry for the Cinematic and Web Funnel Engine (ADR-7, ADR-8). Every model is addressed everywhere else in this skill by its registry `model_id`, never by provider marketing name. Provider wire slugs and prices live ONLY here; resolve them through providers/base.py:ModelRegistry at build/run time. Never hardcode a slug or price in a script, prompt, or manifest.
pricing_disclaimer: Prices below are the best evidence captured in this repository at snapshot_date. Where a model's `price.verified` is false or `price.amount` is null, no confirmed current price exists and the budget gate (U7, AF-CWFE-PAID-GATE) MUST query Kie.ai's live pricing/account surface before authorizing a paid call on that model — this registry snapshot is never itself the authorization. Spec section 10.5 budget-tier heuristics are illustrative planning figures only and must never be read into this file as a priced value.

concept_image.description: Cheap early-concept stills for client review before any production spend (spec 10.2 default policy).

production_scene_image.description: Reference-consistent production scene stills, 16:9 2K (spec 10.2 default policy; fleet-verified image pipeline).

draft_motion.description: Lowest-cost Seedance-class draft clip for creative review before final render (spec 10.2 default policy).

final_connected_motion.description: Seedance-class model with two-image input_urls frame pinning for seam-continuous final scene/connector renders (ADR-8, ADR-9).

premium_photoreal_override.description: Veo-class premium override after explicit budget-cap approval and frame-control verification (spec 10.2 default policy; optional, never the default).

price.source: 47-movie-producer/kie-adapters/tools/graphics/kie_image.py KieImage.estimate_cost() — an internal fleet operational estimate baked into the adapter, not a price confirmed against a Kie.ai published pricing page (kie-setup-full.md has no gpt-image-2 pricing section as of snapshot_date).
price.note: Budget gate must re-verify against live Kie.ai pricing/account balance deltas before treating this as authoritative.

price.source: 47-movie-producer/kie-adapters/tools/graphics/kie_image.py KieImage.estimate_cost() — an internal fleet operational estimate baked into the adapter, not a price confirmed against a Kie.ai published pricing page (kie-setup-full.md has no gpt-image-2 pricing section as of snapshot_date).
price.note: Budget gate must re-verify against live Kie.ai pricing/account balance deltas before treating this as authoritative.

price.source: 47-movie-producer/kie-adapters/tools/video/kie_video.py KieVideo.estimate_cost() (0.10 * duration) — internal fleet operational estimate, not confirmed against a Kie.ai published pricing page (kie-setup-full.md has no gemini-omni-video pricing section as of snapshot_date).
price.note: Budget gate must re-verify against live Kie.ai pricing/account balance deltas before treating this as authoritative.

models.integration_note: Not yet reachable through 47-movie-producer/kie-adapters/tools/video/kie_video.py as of this snapshot — kie_video.py's model enum is limited to gemini-omni-video/veo3/veo3_fast. Extending kie_video.py (or adding this capability through the provider interface in lockstep with it, never a divergent client) is U5's scope, not this unit's.

audio.note: enabling audio increases cost per Kie docs

price.source: 07-kie-setup/kie-setup-full.md §"Seedance 1.5 Pro" — states explicitly "Pricing not listed on this page."
price.note: NO CONFIRMED PRICE EXISTS for this model as of snapshot_date. Spec §10.5's ~$0.057/video-second figure is a non-binding illustrative planning heuristic from a source analysis, NOT a Kie.ai published price, and must never be substituted here. The budget gate (U7, AF-CWFE-PAID-GATE) MUST resolve a live price (Kie.ai pricing page or account credit-debit observation) before any paid call against this model_id, and must hard-stop if none can be established.

reference_image_support.note: 1 image = single reference frame; 2 images = first/last frame (FIRST_AND_LAST_FRAMES_2_VIDEO generation type)

duration_limits.note: Veo 3.1 clips are limited to 8 seconds per Kie quickstart FAQ

audio.note: background audio included by default; upstream may suppress in sensitive cases

price.source: 07-kie-setup/kie-setup-full.md §"Veo 3.1 API Documentation (KIE.ai)" → "Important pricing note": "Veo 3.1 Fast tier: $0.40".
price.note: 4K upgrade costs additional credits (~2x a Fast generation per docs); not itemized separately here — resolve at the pricing endpoint when 4K is requested.

reference_image_support.note: 1 image = single reference frame; 2 images = first/last frame (FIRST_AND_LAST_FRAMES_2_VIDEO generation type)

duration_limits.note: Veo 3.1 clips are limited to 8 seconds per Kie quickstart FAQ

audio.note: background audio included by default; upstream may suppress in sensitive cases

price.source: 07-kie-setup/kie-setup-full.md §"Veo 3.1 API Documentation (KIE.ai)" → "Important pricing note": "Veo 3.1 Quality tier: $2.00".
price.note: 4K upgrade costs additional credits (~2x a Fast generation per docs); not itemized separately here — resolve at the pricing endpoint when 4K is requested. Requires explicit budget-cap approval per capability_tiers.premium_photoreal_override.
